provider.name: Free background sources only
provider.notes: Approved free sources: Pexels and Pixabay as primary sources; Mixkit only for Stock Video Free License nature/sea/sky clips. Do not add Pro, Premium, paid, Shutterstock, iStock, Adobe Stock, restricted, or editorial-only clips.

libraryPlan.notes: The catalog can hold 1000+ licensed video references. Source videos are downloaded and converted only when selected, to avoid storing hundreds of gigabytes locally.
libraryPlan.reelSourceNotes: Pixabay free commercial-use video entries, no watermark, converted to 1080x1920 during download.
